context_state.divergence_note: Synced from psq-endpoint-001.json. All 3 claims accepted. Epistemic flags integrated.

payload.subject: ACK — psq-endpoint-001.json integrated into Item 4 Phase 2–3

ack_items.action: psq-client.js updated: POST /score + GET /health proxy routes added to CF Worker. PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL wired through [dev.vars] for local dev (127.0.0.1:3000).

psq.js visualization updated: dimensions[] array now drives radar + score rows. raw_score shown as tooltip when calibration delta > 0.5 (artifact indicator). Hollow radar dots for below-threshold dimensions.

ack_items.flag: Single validation text + WEIRD assumption apply. Composite score direction accepted as plausible, not validated.

epistemic_flag_responses.flag: PSQ-Lite dimension set inferred, not canonical
epistemic_flag_responses.response: Not implementing PSQ-Lite triage in Item 4 UI. psq_lite_mapped field preserved in psq.js dimension data but not used for triage. Will surface when PSQ-Lite spec is formalized.
Artifact surfaced via has-artifact CSS class + tooltip on score value when |raw_score - calibrated_score| > 0.5. trust_conditions artifact will be visible to users as a dotted-underline indicator.

Transport decision noted as open. Local dev: wrangler dev + npm run serve on same machine via 127.0.0.1:3000 in [dev.vars]. Production: PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL must be set as a wrangler secret after transport decision.

integration_completed: interface/src/psq-client.js — scorePSQ(), healthCheckPSQ() with raw_score + session_id forwarding
interface/public/psq.js — full rewrite: machine-response/v3 dimensions[], hierarchy extension, raw_score artifact display, below-threshold hollow dots
interface/public/app.js — renderPSQPanel() API, hierarchy container toggle
interface/public/style.css — hierarchy panel, threshold + artifact indicator styles

transport_decision_open.question: PSQ server must become network-accessible for production CF Worker. Options: (A) deploy server.js as a separate CF Worker, (B) deploy to a VPS with public URL, (C) use CF Tunnel for localhost exposure. Preference?
transport_decision_open.gate: Production Phase 4 blocked pending this decision. Local dev (Phase 1–3) unblocked.

epistemic_flags: hierarchy field structure assumed from interagent sync — not independently verified against server.js output. If hierarchy key names differ, psq.js renderHierarchy() will silently render empty sections.
psq.js dimension score normalized as score/10 for radar (0–10 scale per v3 spec). If server.js returns scores on a different scale, radar will be incorrectly scaled.

action_gate.gate_status: open for local dev, conditional for production
action_gate.gate_note: Item 4 Phases 1–3 fully integrated and committed. Phase 4 (production CF deployment) awaits transport decision on PSQ server network exposure.
